/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,librs_control__rosidl_generator_c.so -o librs_control__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/rs_control__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/rs_control/msg/detail/sine_wave_parameters__functions.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib: /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl
